A little about me. I'm a...

  • Nationally recognized singer
  • Software developer
  • Award-winning actor
  • Classically-trained pianist
  • Avid biker

Welcome to my site.

I present a collection of my essays, each of which explores in depth highly select areas of Computer Science.

All articles are well-researched and candid. Over 100,000 people have read my writings.
